questions.question: The main six year old protagonist in Calvin and Hobbes is named after what theologian?
Who is the creator of the comic series "The Walking Dead"?
In Black Hammer, what city did the heroes save from the Anti-God?
What is Homestuck character Gamzee's last name?
What was the name of the first Robin in the Batman comics?
Which of the following rings from the DC Comics' "Lantern Corps" are classified as Parasitic?
Which indie comic by the creator of 'Snotgirl' features a protagonist who navigates a world where reality is breaking down, known as 'Glitch'?
questions.explanation: The indie comic 'Glitch' is created by Bryan Lee O'Malley, known for his work on 'Snotgirl.' The story follows Patience, a character dealing with a world where reality is unstable, exploring themes of identity and technology. This comic is notable for its unique storytelling and artistic style.

questions.question: Which unusual DC Comics character, known for being a sentient living planet, first appeared in 'Green Lantern' #24 in 1963?
questions.explanation: Mogo is a unique character in the DC Universe, as it is a sentient planet that serves as a member of the Green Lantern Corps. It first appeared in 'Green Lantern' #24 in 1963. Mogo plays a crucial role in the Corps by directing Power Rings to new bearers and providing a training ground for Lanterns, showcasing the wide range of creativity in DC Comics.
